personas.name: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
personas.goal: A public-grounded model that can manufacture artifacts, receipts, validation shapes, and proof surfaces.

personas.name: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
personas.goal: Control execution becomes visible, reproducible, and receipt-backed.

personas.name: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
personas.goal: Agents act only through admitted plans and verified receipts.

personas.name: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
personas.goal: Clean admission path from source to published artifact.

personas.name: The Process Intelligence Analyst (PI-1 to PI-8)
personas.goal: Turn work into object-centric route evidence (OCEL).

personas.name: The Product / UX Operator (UX-1 to UX-8)
personas.goal: Translate proof depth into honest user states.

personas.name: The Domain Steward (DS-1 to DS-8)
personas.goal: Every need has an owner, route, status, and evidence of closure.

personas.name: The Scientific / Infrastructure Strategist (IS-1 to IS-8)
personas.goal: Large-scale R&D represeantable as micro-interventions with verifiable closure.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: `wasm4pm` parses POWL/XES input, validating namespace prefixes (`shacl:NodeShape`, `prov:Entity`). Emits `import_receipt`.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: `wasm4pm` Rejects private extensions not mapped to public PROV-O/DCAT/SKOS. Emits refusal receipt.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Evaluates `wasm4pm` generated traces against `.specify/templates` SHACL. Blocks if missing fields.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: OntoStar uses `onto_search` to map `wasm4pm` constructs to public ontologies.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: `ggen` (μ) projects extraction queries for process mining. Emits `extraction-plan` receipt.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Reconstructs O* using ρ(A, μ, R), binding WASM algorithms back to source triple.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: `wasm4pm` discovery algorithms refuse closure without `start_time` / `end_time` limits.

jtbds.persona: The Ontology Architect (OA-1 to OA-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Returns deterministic BLAKE3-hashed receipt states.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Checks `.ggen/receipts/` for policy execution trace in `wasm4pm` (e.g., algorithm limits).

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Poka-Yoke hooks refuse `wasm4pm` execution on unauthorized datasets. Emits `consent-refusal`.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Human-in-the-loop requirement flag stops automatic `wasm4pm` ML training closure.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Negative test failure explicitly maps to SKOS-controlled refusal code.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Re-hashing the `wasm4pm` `artifact_hash` detects checksum drift and emits `tamper_receipt`.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Extracts all `wasm4pm` algorithms and test runs into an EARL/DCAT bundle.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Tenant-layer read/write validation (A2A permissions) strictly bounds WASM execution.

jtbds.persona: The Compliance / Assurance Lead (CL-1 to CL-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: `wasm4pm` process discovery algorithms that complete without generating a trace receipt trigger `FalsePass` defects.

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Gemini CLI executes `wasm4pm` via admitted ActuationPlan (wrapper execution).

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Attempts to bypass wrapper trigger boundary denial (yolo interception).

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: System classifies `ReceiptMissing` if agent claims `wasm4pm` tests passed without new BLAKE3 hashes.

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Git tree before/after validation binds source changes to `wasm4pm` artifact compilation.

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Agent write attempt outside `/tmp/open-ontologies` or target scope yields refusal receipt.

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Cargo/npm failure in `wasm4pm` emits execution-failed receipt.

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: A dirty git tree blocks `wasm4pm` tarball/publish route.

jtbds.persona: The AI Coding Agent Supervisor (AS-1 to AS-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Agent summaries are verified against `wasm4pm` execution receipts.

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Git tree checks block release admission.

jtbds.claimed_capability: Verifies file manifest for `wasm4pm` `pkg/` output, enforcing size/checksum boundaries.

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: `wasm4pm.js` tarball hash embedded into release certificate.

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Lint/Type/Test/Bench executed, recording explicit receipts for each phase.

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Requires certificates for all crates (`wasm4pm-cognition`, `wasm4pm-algos`).

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Emits post-publish receipt via registry metadata read.

jtbds.persona: The Release / Platform Engineer (RE-1 to RE-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Installs published `wasm4pm` in isolated testbed to confirm operational parity.

jtbds.persona: The Process Intelligence Analyst (PI-1 to PI-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Analyzes `wasm4pm` log graphs for hanging edges (missing final receipts).

jtbds.persona: The Process Intelligence Analyst (PI-1 to PI-8)

jtbds.persona: The Process Intelligence Analyst (PI-1 to PI-8)
jtbds.claimed_capability: Analyzes performance spectrum and time-deltas across process states.

jtbds.persona: The Process Intelligence Analyst (PI-1 to PI-8)

jtbds.persona: The Product / UX Operator (UX-1 to UX-8)
